Spinner

An animated loading spinner. Animates when isAnimating is true.

React Example​

import React from 'react'
import {Stack, Spinner, Text, run} from '@teaui/react'

function App() {
  return (
    <Stack.right gap={1}>
      <Spinner isAnimating />
      <Text>Loading...</Text>
    </Stack.right>
  )
}

run(<App />)

Props​

PropTypeDefaultDescription
isAnimatingbooleanfalseStart/stop animation

The spinner is 1×1 cell and cycles through braille animation frames.

Core API
import {Spinner} from '@teaui/core'

new Spinner({isAnimating: true})
